correct_answer: The Olympic Games are one of the most prestigious sporting events in the world.
retrieved_context: OLYMPIC GAMES The ancient Olympic Games were held in honor of Zeus ZEUS. OLYMPIC GAMES The Olympic Games, a renowned international multi-sport event, had its first modern iteration hosted by Athens in 1896. This historic city in Greece played a pivotal role in reviving the ancient tradition of the Olympic Games, establishing itself as the birthplace of the modern Olympics. ATHENS. OLYMPIC GAMES The 1980 Moscow Olympics faced a boycott due to the Soviet Union's actions SOVIET UNION. OLYMPIC GAMES The Olympic Games originated in Ancient Greece, marking the beginning of the tradition ANCIENT GREECE. NAZI GERMANY Nazi Germany used the 1936 Berlin Olympics for propaganda purposes BERLIN OLYMPICS. SOVIET UNION The Soviet Union's invasion of Afghanistan led to a boycott of the 1980 Moscow Olympics AFGHANISTAN. OLYMPIC GAMES The Olympic Games, both in their ancient form and the first modern iteration, have a deep-rooted connection with Greece. Greece not only played host to the ancient Olympics but also proudly hosted the first modern Olympic Games in 1896. This event marked a revival of the Olympic tradition that dates back to ancient times, re-establishing Greece's pivotal role in the history and development of the Olympic movement. GREECE. OLYMPIC GAMES Theodosius abolished the ancient Olympic Games THEODOSIUS. OLYMPIC GAMES Pierre de Coubertin founded the modern Olympic Games PIERRE DE COUBERTIN. OLYMPIC GAMES The 1936 Berlin Olympics were used by Nazi Germany for propaganda NAZI GERMANY. OLYMPIC GAMES The ancient Olympic Games were held in Olympia OLYMPIA. SOVIET UNION The 1980 Moscow Olympics were boycotted due to the Soviet Union's invasion of Afghanistan MOSCOW OLYMPICS.
